ModMetaData.name: Transtar Aesthetics Weapon Retexture Pack
ModMetaData.author: Fluffwaffle
ModMetaData.description:
An optional side mod to the Prey 2017 Weapon Retextures mod to also retexture other Industrial tech weapons to feel at home with those textures.
Currently has retextures for: Revolver Bolt Action Rifle Assault Rifle Chain Shotgun Sniper Rifle Heavy SMG Machine Pistol Frag Grenades (including VWE - Grenades variants) Molotovs (including VWE - Grenades variants) Incendiary Launcher EMP Launcher Beer
More retextures to come soon.
